name: personal-policy-prototype
description: VIPA SWCRM Control Center desktop package
author: VIPA

scripts.package:win: npm run build && electron-packager . "VIPA SWCRM Control Center" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite --icon=build/icon.ico --prune=true
scripts.share:win: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$folder = Get-ChildItem release -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'VIPA SWCRM Control Center-win32-x64' } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $folder) { throw 'Missing packaged app folder under release.' }; $zip = 'release\VIPA-SWCRM-Control-Center-win.zip'; if (Test-Path $zip) { Remove-Item $zip -Force }; $archiveSource = Join-Path $folder.FullName '*'; Compress-Archive -Path $archiveSource -DestinationPath $zip -Force"
